attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
N.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
N.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_CX_PRODUCT,
PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
SUM(DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT,
RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT ,
RFMY.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME
FROM $$FINLGLDB.MT_ADV_SRVCS_COGS_CX N
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=N.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE N.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT >=(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=1 AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE=3) 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,8,9,10,11

SELECT
  		SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		N.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
		'FY'||TRIM(N.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT) AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,
		SUBSTR(N.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
		FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
		N.DV_CX_PRODUCT,
		N.PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
		N.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
		N.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
		RP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
		RP.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
		RP.SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
		COALESCE(SWH.MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD ,
		COALESCE(SWH.RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD ,
		RP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ,
		RP.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID ,
		COALESCE(SWH.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ,
		'UNKNOWN' AS DV_SW_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
		RP.RU_BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID AS  BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ,
		'UNKNOWN' AS REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
		'UNKNOWN' AS DV_DATA_SOURCE_NAME ,
		((N.DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT) * Coalesce(SWH.ALLOCATION_PCT,1) (DECIMAL(18,6)) ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT,
		CASE WHEN RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD IN( 'UNKNOWN','SON_HCL') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DIVESTITURE_FLG
		--,GSP,
		FROM	$$STGDB.WI_MT_AS_COGS N  
		INNER JOIN ( select A.* FROM 
		(SEL	ITEM_KEY,RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
		RU_BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD
		FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.$$MAP_TGT_VAR2 
		group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8)A 
		INNER JOIN (SEL	GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_AS_COGS GROUP BY 1) B 
			ON A.ITEM_KEY = B.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY) RP   
	ON RP.ITEM_KEY=N.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY      
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN SWH 
	ON N.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY=SWH.PRODUCT_KEY
	AND SWH.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=N.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
	AND SWH.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('COGS','UNKNOWN')

SELECT
  		 SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
		 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,
		 DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
		 FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
		 DV_CX_PRODUCT,
		 PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
		 GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
		 BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
		 RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
		 PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
		 SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
		 MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD ,
		 RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD ,
		 BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ,
		 BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID ,
		 BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ,
		 DV_SW_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
		 BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ,
		 REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
		 DV_DATA_SOURCE_NAME ,
		((N.DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT) * Coalesce(TMS.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE,1)  (DECIMAL(18,6)) ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT,
		DIVESTITURE_FLG,
		COALESCE(TMS.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS L2_TMS_NAME 
		FROM	$$STGDB.WI_PNL_MSR_AS_COGS1 N  
	INNER JOIN (
		SELECT	CORP.ITEM_KEY,
				RTMS.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
				SUM(CORP.DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ) AS DOLLAR_ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE	
				FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_TECH_MKT_SEGMENT RTMS 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_TMS_CORP_PRODUCT_ALLOC CORP 
				ON RTMS.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY = CORP.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY 
				WHERE	RTMS.HIERARCHY_TYPE='TMS_CORPORATE' 
				AND CORP.ITEM_KEY>-1000000
				GROUP BY 1,2
			) TMS 
			ON N.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY=TMS.ITEM_KEY

SELECT   SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
         DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
         DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,
         DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
         N.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
         DV_CX_PRODUCT,
         PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
         GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
         BK_AS_PROJECT_CD,
         RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
         PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD,
         SOFTWARE_STACK_CD,
         MONETIZATION_TYPE_CD ,
         RU_SOFTWARE_USAGE_TYPE_CD ,
         BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ,
         BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID ,
         BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ,
         DV_SW_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
         BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ,
         REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
         DV_DATA_SOURCE_NAME ,
        (((N.DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT) 
        )  (DECIMAL(18,6)) ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_COGS_USD_AMT,
        DIVESTITURE_FLG,
        L2_TMS_NAME ,      
        'Services ASS_L1' AS INTERNAL_BE_NAME,
        'Services ASS_L1' AS INTERNAL_BE_DESCR,
        'Services AS' AS INTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,
        'Services AS' AS INTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR,
        'Services' AS BUSINESS_GROUP_DESCR,
        'UNKNOWN' AS EXTERNAL_BE_NAME,  
        'UNKNOWN'  AS EXTERNAL_BE_DESCR, 
        'UNKNOWN' AS EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_NAME,  
        'UNKNOWN' AS EXTERNAL_SUB_BE_DESCR  
        FROM    $$STGDB.WI_PNL_MSR_AS_COGS2 N
